codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior blocking integration gap: createProductionServerOptions now wires contactStore into production relay options, and entrypoint-wiring tests now assert contact-store presence plus production-route/annotation activation. Reviewing both f60952a and b19db15 confirms the originally gated first-contact behavior is now active in real production startup paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill requires manual CLI/API/SSE sanity checks for user-facing changes (or explicit skip rationale for internal-only changes), but this fix handoff reports followedProcedure=true without interactiveChecks or an explicit skip rationale.

summary: Pass. The fix commit b19db15 wires ContactStore into src/relay/index.ts production options and adds entrypoint-level assertions in test/relay/entrypoint-wiring.test.ts that validate /contacts/status, /contacts/approve, /contacts/pending, and first_contact/autonomy_allowed annotations through production wiring.
